title: Login page not loading
description: Customer unable to access login page. It shows a blank screen.

title: Payment failed but amount deducted
description: Customer reports payment was deducted but order not confirmed.

title: Password reset email not received
description: User requested password reset but did not receive any email.

title: Error 500 on dashboard
description: Internal server error appears when accessing dashboard.

title: Profile picture not updating
description: User cannot update profile image; upload fails.

title: Order status incorrect
description: Order marked as delivered but customer did not receive it.

title: App crashes on startup
description: Mobile app crashes immediately after launching.

title: Unable to download invoice
description: Customer unable to download invoice PDF from account page.

title: Search functionality slow
description: Search results take too long to load.

title: Discount code not working
description: Promo code shows invalid even though it is active.

title: Notification emails delayed
description: Customers receiving notification emails several hours late.

title: Account locked unexpectedly
description: User account locked without any suspicious activity.

title: Language setting not saving
description: Selected language resets after page refresh.

title: Two-factor authentication issue
description: OTP code not accepted during login.

title: Data export not generating file
description: Export button does not generate CSV file.
